title: Total Overhead Variance
event: Reyes Co. incurred actual overhead of $82,000; the standard cost system applied $80,000 of overhead for the output achieved. Compute the total overhead variance and its direction.

computationPaths.narration: The total overhead variance compares what happened against what the standards applied for actual output.

memorize.body: Total OH variance = actual overhead − overhead applied at standard for actual output. Actual higher = Unfavorable.
This total splits into controllable and volume variances in the extended analysis — the total is always the sanity check on the pieces.

questions.prompt: Actual OH $82,000, applied at standard $80,000. Total overhead variance = ?

distractors.feedback: Magnitude right, direction wrong — actual EXCEEDED applied, so the 2,000 is UNFAVORABLE.
You added the two figures. Variances are DIFFERENCES: 82,000 − 80,000 = 2,000 U.
